title: Candace Owens questions Erika Kirk's 'vision from God' remark in resurfaced Charlie Kirk interview
summary_full: Candace Owens reignited online debate after revisiting a past interview with the late Charlie Kirk, focusing on his wife Erika's suggestion that he keep his phone on the day of the assassination attempt. Owens questioned the unusual remark and implied it deserved closer scrutiny. Kirk had explained he witnessed the incident unfold from a gym before alerting his team that "something is very wrong." His account has resurfaced following his death.
